report:
Veteran campaigner from Bot Bash Party Crew - 11-11 career record across the Discovery era.
Hammer-saw archetype in a league now 42% vertical spinners: the contrarian weapon story of Group A.
Team posted "Pro League is a wrap. We had the best time" from the Vegas taping - they finished filming healthy.
r/battlebots group-stage predictions frame Group A as "between Skorpios and Manta" - with a slight fan lean to Manta.
The official group card has Skorpios opening against the league's most hyped newcomer this week.
Group A also holds Terrortops and Valkyrie - fans rate it winnable for either favorite.
No reported damage or rebuild drama found in the scraped sources.
Team is selling official Pro League merch - normal signs of a settled campaign.
The scout read: proven durability against an unproven spotlight bot.
No recent intel found on weapon or drivetrain changes for this build.
note: cached demo report - written by Claude from the MCP-scraped sources listed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY enables live generation)
